title: 2hdm-a summary schema extension
description: Extends the universal core summary schema for the 2HDM+a model. Declares model-specific gate_check fields. Channel names (bbx, ccx, etc.) are documented here as hints but remain free strings at runtime — they are parameter-point properties, not model properties.

gate_check.description: Gate assertions computed at write time for 2hdm-a. bbx_* fields are specific to the off-resonance benchmark (Mchi=100, Ma=400, tanβ=10).

bbx_fraction.description: Fraction of annihilation to bbx channel at the parameter point.

bbx_threshold_pct.description: Threshold fraction (as a decimal) for bbx dominance gate.

bbx_gate_pass.description: Alias for bbx_threshold_passed for backward compatibility.
